en: Again he entered the synagogue, and a man was there with a withered hand.
zh: 耶穌又進了會堂，在那裡有一個人，他的一隻手枯乾了。

en: And they watched Jesus, to see whether he would heal him on the Sabbath, so that they might accuse him.
zh: 眾人窺探他會不會在安息日醫治那個人，好去控告他。

en: And he said to the man with the withered hand, "Come here."
zh: 耶穌對那一隻手枯乾了的人說：“起來，站在當中！”

en: And he said to them, "Is it lawful on the Sabbath to do good or to do harm, to save life or to kill?" But they were silent.
zh: 又對他們說：“在安息日哪一樣是可以作的呢：作好事還是壞事？救命還是害命？”他們一聲不響。

en: And he looked around at them with anger, grieved at their hardness of heart, and said to the man, "Stretch out your hand." He stretched it out, and his hand was restored.
zh: 耶穌怒目環視他們，因他們的心剛硬而難過，就對那人說：“伸出手來！”他把手一伸，手就復原了。

en: The Pharisees went out and immediately held counsel with the Herodians against him, how to destroy him.
zh: 法利賽人出來，立刻和希律黨人商量怎樣對付耶穌，好除掉他。

en: Jesus withdrew with his disciples to the sea, and a great crowd followed, from Galilee and Judea
zh: 耶穌和門徒退到海邊去，一大群從加利利來的人跟著他；

en: and Jerusalem and Idumea and from beyond the Jordan and from around Tyre and Sidon. When the great crowd heard all that he was doing, they came to him.
zh: 還有許多人聽見他所作的一切事，就從猶太、耶路撒冷、以土邁、約旦河外和推羅、西頓一帶地方來到他跟前。

en: And he told his disciples to have a boat ready for him because of the crowd, lest they crush him,
zh: 因為人多，耶穌就吩咐門徒為他預備一隻小船，免得眾人擁擠他。

en: for he had healed many, so that all who had diseases pressed around him to touch him.
zh: 他醫好了許多人，所以凡有病的都擠過來要摸他。

en: And whenever the unclean spirits saw him, they fell down before him and cried out, "You are the Son of God."
zh: 污靈每次看到他，就仆倒在他面前，大聲喊叫說：“你是 神的兒子！”

en: And he strictly ordered them not to make him known.
zh: 耶穌再三嚴厲地吩咐他們，不要把他的身分張揚出去。

en: And he went up on the mountain and called to him those whom he desired, and they came to him.
zh: 耶穌上了山，呼召自己所要的人，他們就來了。

en: And he appointed twelve (whom he also named apostles) so that they might be with him and he might send them out to preach
zh: 他選立了十二個人，稱他們為使徒 ，要他們跟自己常在一起，好差遣他們去傳道，

en: and have authority to cast out demons.
zh: 又有權柄趕鬼。

en: He appointed the twelve: Simon (to whom he gave the name Peter);
zh: 他選立的十二個人是：西門 ，

en: James the son of Zebedee and John the brother of James (to whom he gave the name Boanerges, that is, Sons of Thunder);
zh: 西庇太的兒子雅各，和雅各的弟弟約翰 ，

en: Andrew, and Philip, and Bartholomew, and Matthew, and Thomas, and James the son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus, and Simon the Cananaean,
zh: 安得烈、腓力、巴多羅邁、馬太、多馬、亞勒腓的兒子雅各、達太、激進派的西門，

en: and Judas Iscariot, who betrayed him.
zh: 以及加略人猶大，就是出賣耶穌的那個人。

en: Then he went home, and the crowd gathered again, so that they could not even eat.
zh: 耶穌進了屋子，群眾又聚了來，以致他們連飯都不能吃，

en: And when his family heard it, they went out to seize him, for they were saying, "He is out of his mind."
zh: 那些和他在一起的人聽見了，就出來抓住他，因為他們說他癲狂了。

en: And the scribes who came down from Jerusalem were saying, "He is possessed by Beelzebul," and "by the prince of demons he casts out the demons."
zh: 從耶路撒冷下來的經學家說：“他有別西卜附在身上！”又說：“他靠著鬼王趕鬼。”

en: And he called them to him and said to them in parables, "How can Satan cast out Satan?
zh: 耶穌把他們叫來，用比喻對他們說：“撒但怎能趕逐撒但呢？

en: If a kingdom is divided against itself, that kingdom cannot stand.
zh: 一國若自相紛爭，那國就站立不住；

en: And if a house is divided against itself, that house will not be able to stand.
zh: 一家若自相紛爭，那家就站立不住。

en: And if Satan has risen up against himself and is divided, he cannot stand, but is coming to an end.
zh: 如果撒但自相攻打紛爭，不但站立不住，而且還要滅亡。

en: But no one can enter a strong man's house and plunder his goods, unless he first binds the strong man. Then indeed he may plunder his house.
zh: 誰都不能進入壯漢的家，搶奪他的財物，除非先把壯漢捆綁起來，才可以搶劫他的家。

en: "Truly, I say to you, all sins will be forgiven the children of man, and whatever blasphemies they utter,
zh: 我實在告訴你們，世人的一切罪和一切褻瀆的話，都可以得到赦免；

en: but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit never has forgiveness, but is guilty of an eternal sin"-
zh: 但褻瀆聖靈的，就永世不得赦免，他還要擔當罪惡到永遠。”

en: for they had said, "He has an unclean spirit."
zh: 耶穌說這話，是因為他們說他有污靈附在身上。

en: And his mother and his brothers came, and standing outside they sent to him and called him.
zh: 耶穌的母親和弟弟來了，站在外面，傳話給他，叫他出來。

en: And a crowd was sitting around him, and they said to him, "Your mother and your brothers are outside, seeking you."
zh: 有許多人正圍坐在耶穌身邊，他們告訴他：“你看，你的母親和弟弟 在外面找你。”

en: And he answered them, "Who are my mother and my brothers?"
zh: 耶穌回答他們：“誰是我的母親，我的弟兄呢？”

en: And looking about at those who sat around him, he said, "Here are my mother and my brothers!
zh: 於是四面觀看那些圍坐的人，說：“你們看，我的母親！我的弟兄！

en: Whoever does the will of God, he is my brother and sister and mother."
zh: 凡遵行 神旨意的，就是我的弟兄姊妹和母親了。”
